title: Crisis/helpline reference set: verified against official sources, region-appropriate, dated
context: The pilot cancer-site explainer (incidence-explorers-explainer-013) may need crisis, distress, or cancer-support helpline references. Any such information must be verified against the official source, region-appropriate, and dated (lastVerified) before inclusion. An unverified or stale entry must be withheld. This is a HIGH-risk data task because incorrect or stale helpline information could harm a distressed person in a cancer context. No partner, oncologist, or advocate is yet secured to review this set.
objective: Compile and verify a crisis/helpline reference set for inclusion in the pilot cancer-site explainer: each helpline entry is verified against its official source (not secondary lists), is region/language-appropriate for the target audience, carries a lastVerified date, and is reviewed by the patient advocate (and oncologist where clinically relevant). Entries that cannot be verified against the official source or that are out of region/language are withheld.
acceptanceCriteria: Each helpline entry is verified against its official source (not a secondary listing); the verification source URL and method are recorded
Each entry carries a lastVerified date stamp
Entries are region-appropriate and language-appropriate for the intended audience; a US-only helpline is not presented to non-US readers without a region flag
Unverified, stale, or out-of-region entries are withheld from the published set

Reviewed by the patient advocate (and oncologist where clinically relevant) and signed off (recorded in the reviewers ledger) before the set ships — blocking gate for incidence-explorers-explainer-013
output: A verified, dated crisis/helpline reference dataset with each entry confirmed against its official source, region-appropriate, and carrying a lastVerified date — reviewed and signed off by the patient advocate — for use in incidence-explorers-explainer-013 and any subsequent patient-facing content.
